claims.claim: n8n stable line is 2.21.x as of May 2026, beta on 2.22.0
claims.note: Releasebot lists 2.22.0 released 2026-05-20 (bug fixes), current stable 2.21.4

claims.claim: CVE-2026-21858 (Ni8mare) is unauthenticated RCE via webhook/form, CVSS 10.0, patched in 1.121.0 and 2.10.1
claims.note: Cross-confirmed via The Hacker News and Rapid7

claims.claim: CVE-2026-27493 and CVE-2026-27577 chain (March 2026) escalates to host RCE on n8n < 2.10.1 / 2.9.3 / 1.123.22
n8n 2.x ships native LangChain integration (Tools Agent, Conversational Agent, Memory nodes, Vector Stores for RAG)
claims.note: Confirmed via n8n docs and finbyz.tech 2.0 article

claims.claim: n8n Vector Store nodes support Pinecone, Qdrant, and Supabase pgvector for RAG
n8n ships MCP Client Tool and MCP Server Trigger nodes for Model Context Protocol
Israel Invoice Reform 2026 threshold drops to 5,000 NIS from June 1, 2026 (was 10,000 NIS Jan 1)
claims.note: Confirmed via KPMG and Morning by Green Invoice support docs

claims.claim: Tranzila API v2 authenticates via X-tranzila-api-app-key HTTP header (not Basic Auth)
claims.note: Header confirmed via Stoplight API explorer at docs.tranzila.com (deep-link to the v2 page returns 404 from public CDN; navigate from the docs index)

claims.claim: Tranzila v2 Bit flow returns iframe URL with QR code; supports tokenization, recurring billing, 3D Secure
Cardcom API v11 endpoint is https://secure.cardcom.solutions/api/v11 with HTTPS-only webhook URLs
Cardcom webhook requires publicly-accessible HTTPS URL; localhost requires tunneling (ngrok / Cloudflare Tunnel)
EZCount provides REST documents API with api_key + api_email auth in body and SDKs in PHP/Java/.NET/Ruby/Node/Python
claims.note: API contract per EZCount developer support; Postman documenter URL renders only the heading without anonymous access. Endpoint + auth shape verified against EZCount developer support docs.

claims.claim: n8n Webhook node supports four auth modes: None, Basic Auth, Header Auth, JWT Auth
n8n JWT Auth validates signature but does NOT auto-check exp / iss / aud claims
n8n has no built-in HMAC signature verifier; must be implemented in a Code node
n8n editor keyboard shortcuts fail under Hebrew keyboard layout (uses e.key instead of e.code), tracked as issue #12569
n8n text/expression editor has no native RTL support (community feature request)
n8n Sustainable Use License 2026: free self-hosted, allows commercial consulting/support, blocks rebranding as a competing SaaS
Azure Israel Central region has been GA since 2023 (already covered in skill, not new in 2026)
Hebcal REST API rate limit is 90 requests per 10-second window (returns HTTP 429 over limit)
Hebcal API content is licensed CC-BY 4.0 (commercial reuse permitted with attribution)
n8n cloud pricing 2026: free self-hosted, Starter EUR 24/mo, Pro EUR 60/mo, Business EUR 800/mo; EU-hosted in Frankfurt
claims.note: No Israeli cloud region for n8n SaaS; self-hosted on Israeli VPS (Kamatera, AWS il-central-1) covers data residency

claims.claim: n8n Anthropic Chat Model node added adaptive thinking mode for Claude Opus 4.7+ in recent releases
